dialogos.texto_en: What's up, you two going shopping?
Oh, Uesugi-kun, you've come here too.
It seems like there are a lot of fashion shops\naround here. Did you find anything interesting?
I'm not really interested in clothes...
That makes sense.\nWell, then please accompany us on our shopping trip.
Would you please be our pack mule?
...You're not trying to use me, are you?
Please show us that level of determination.
Ah, this shop is really nice.\nThere are clothes with Okinawan color schemes.
They look like they could be worn\nas casual clothes too.\nShall we take a look?
(I've heard them talk about clothes before.\n I think Ichika likes more mature styles\n and Yotsuba likes more childish ones...)
(...Which isn't really useful information.)
So?\nHave you decided on what to buy?
Something that captures the essence of Okinawa,\nor something easy to wear on a daily basis...\nHard to choose when you see the actual products.
Well, how about this one?
Huh?\nThat outfit is...
It's cute and perfect for summer, isn't it?\nWhat do you think, Uesugi-kun?
Don't ask me.\nI mean, it looks fine to me, I guess.
See, even Uesugi-kun's reaction isn't bad.\nCome on, try it on!
Um, well...\nConsidering the amount of fabric,\nit might be a little too revealing...
Ah, I see%p-2;――
You gained weight, didn't you?
Hyaa!\nWh-what are you doing?!
Could it be that you've relaxed a little too much\nafter being freed from studying for exams?
Especially around here!
P-please stop it!\nDon't touch people's stomachs without permission!
I won't stop! You're the meat bun monster!
M-meat?! Who's the meat bun monster?!
(Hm? 'Meat bun monster'...\n I feel like I've heard that before.)
(That's right.\n Come to think of it, this scene is familiar...)
(What was it...\n I can't remember...)
I-I've had enough!
Itsuki often eats meat buns, doesn't she?\nAnd, really like a monster.
I-I didn't eat that much, did I?!
No no, it was enough to get you to this point.\nMaybe you did eat too much after all?
FHYAA?!
This area in particular is the danger zone, huh?
Hey! Please stop that!
Now I remember!\nYou've gotta be Nino, right?! I'm pretty sure you've\nteased Itsuki about being a meat bun monster before!
No, that's not true.\nWhat are you talking about, all of a sudden?
I'm sure of it!\nYou were the one who called Itsuki\na 'meat bun monster' before, Nino!
Really, now.\nI believe you aren't remembering correctly.
E-enough arguing already!\nStop touching my stomach!
No can do.\nI won't stop\nuntil you reflect on your recent overeating!
I'm not overeating!\nI-I'm just going through a growth spurt,\nthat's all!
If you can't control yourself,\nyou'll be in trouble!
(Itsuki is being punished by Itsuki...\n Wait, or is Itsuki punishing Itsuki?\n What's going on here... What am I seeing?)
Huff, huff...\nY-you're just terrible...
Heh, it seems like\nyou've reflected on your actions, huh?
I'm sure I've been caught like this before.\nAm I up against Nino?
You figured it out quickly.\nAs expected, Ichika.
But you went a little too far.\n*sigh* My stomach still feels weird.
Ahaha.\nI got a little carried away, didn't I?
...Hm?\nWhat are you guys talking about?
It's nothing.
